mapper.sql: dig_position_rel_id, position_id, user_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id, u.user_name, u.user_code, u.phone, u.user_number, MAX(pur.create_time) as create_time,
ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(puo.org_id), ',') orgIds, ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT puo.user_type), ',') userTypes
GROUP_CONCAT(puo.org_id) orgIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT puo.user_type) userTypes
FROM digital_position_user_relation pur INNER JOIN po_users u ON pur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN po_users_organization puo ON u.user_id = puo.user_id WHERE pur.position_id = #{searchQO.positionId}
AND u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchQO.userName}, '%')
GROUP BY u.user_id, u.user_name, u.user_code, u.phone ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO digital_position_user_relation (dig_position_rel_id, position_id, user_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.digPositionRelId}, #{item.positionId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime})
